title: stelis inflata
intro: Stelis inflata, also known as the Inflated Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Stelis inflata include its antispasmodic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe coughs, ease digestive discomfort, and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Stelis inflata can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infusions, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
